2603.24260.title: Accelerating Diffusion-based Video Editing via Heterogeneous Caching: Beyond Full Computing at Sampled Denoising Timestep
2603.24260.paper_summary: Diffusion-based video editing has emerged as an important paradigm for high-quality and flexible content generation. However, despite their generality and strong modeling capacity, Diffusion Transformers (DiT) remain computationally expensive due to the iterative denoising process, posing challenges for practical deployment. Existing video diffusion acceleration methods primarily exploit denoising timestep-level feature reuse, which mitigates the redundancy in denoising process, but overlooks the architectural redundancy within the DiT that many attention operations over spatio-temporal tokens are redundantly executed, offering little to no incremental contribution to the model output. This work introduces HetCache, a training-free diffusion acceleration framework designed to exploit the inherent heterogeneity in diffusion-based masked video-to-video (MV2V) generation and editing. Instead of uniformly reuse or randomly sampling tokens, HetCache assesses the contextual relevance and interaction strength among various types of tokens in designated computing steps. Guided by spatial priors, it divides the spatial-temporal tokens in DiT model into context and generative tokens, and selectively caches the context tokens that exhibit the strongest correlation and most representative semantics with generative ones. This strategy reduces redundant attention operations while maintaining editing consistency and fidelity. Experiments show that HetCache achieves a noticeable acceleration, including a 2.67$\times$ latency speedup and FLOPs reduction over commonly used foundation models, with negligible degradation in editing quality.
2603.24260.paper_summary_zh: 擴散基礎的視頻編輯已成為高品質和靈活內容生成的重要範式。<lb/>然而，儘管擴散Transformer（DiT）具有一般性和強大的建模能力，但由於迭代去噪過程，仍然計算成本高，這對實際部署造成了挑戰。<lb/>現有的視頻擴散加速方法主要利用去噪時間步級特徵重用，這減輕了去噪過程中的冗餘，但忽略了DiT內部的架構冗餘，許多針對時空標記的注意力操作被冗餘執行，對模型輸出的增量貢獻微乎其微。<lb/>本研究介紹了HetCache，一種無需訓練的擴散加速框架，旨在利用擴散基礎的遮罩視頻到視頻（MV2V）生成和編輯中的固有異質性。<lb/>HetCache並不是均勻重用或隨機抽樣標記，而是在指定的計算步驟中評估各類標記之間的上下文相關性和互動強度。<lb/>在空間先驗的指導下，它將DiT模型中的時空標記分為上下文標記和生成標記，並選擇性地緩存與生成標記展現最強相關性和最具代表性的語義的上下文標記。<lb/>這一策略減少了冗餘的注意力操作，同時保持編輯的一致性和真實性。<lb/>實驗表明，HetCache實現了顯著的加速，包括相較於常用基礎模型的2.67$\times$延遲加速和FLOPs減少，且編輯質量幾乎沒有下降。
2603.24260.author: Tianyi Liu et.al.
2603.24260.authors: Tianyi Liu, Ye Lu, Linfeng Zhang, Chen Cai, Jianjun Gao, Yi Wang, Kim-Hui Yap, Lap-Pui Chau
